text.title: Ops Metrics Basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
add target + alert threshold per metric
split into daily / weekly / monthly tiers
assign single human owner per metric
ship metric config; run weekly review next cycle

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=skip-this-methodology
